speaker: charlie
text: Sports news now, and the AFL season continues to deliver great crowds and entertainment. <cite index='23-10'>Melbourne put on a show against Richmond, with Kozzy starring in the Dees' victory over the spirited Tigers</cite>. Always good to see the old rivalries producing quality footy.

speaker: alice
text: Yeah, and looking at the broader Australian sports calendar, we've got so much to look forward to. <cite index='22-17,25-3'>Super Rugby Pacific is building to its climax with finals coming up in late May and early June</cite>. The quality's been excellent this season.

speaker: charlie
text: Plus cricket's never far away in this country. The game just keeps ticking along in the background, doesn't it? Whether it's domestic competitions or international fixtures, there's always something happening on the pitch.
